title: Golden Feather
description: Consume a Golden Feather and gain Slow Falling, Absorption, and Haste effects
body:
**DESCRIPTION** We have Golden Apples in the game, but now we can have Golden Feathers! Simply craft a Golden Feather like you would craft a golden apple but this time use feathers. Consuming the Golden Feather will give you Slow Falling, Absorption, and Haste effects for 10 minutes. This is great for jumping off cliffs or mining!      ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/893/786/golden-feather-recipe.png)   Get a server today and play with your friends! Click HERE or below banner & Use Code GAMERPOTION to get 25 off!
